nodes.name: ARCHITECTURE.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive domain-driven architecture guide for the Lipia Pole Pole credit management platform, covering 15 sections including bounded contexts, entity relationships, state machines, multi-tenancy patterns, authentication/authorization with RBAC, API layer patterns, error handling, and coding conventions.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Mermaid diagrams for ERD and state machines, and defines a Ubiquitous Language glossary — a DDD practice ensuring consistent terminology across code and documentation.

nodes.name: DEVELOPER.md
nodes.summary: Developer-focused guide covering the multi-tenant SaaS architecture, database ERD with key tables, project directory structure, and step-by-step instructions for adding database migrations, new API endpoints, and Supabase Edge Functions.

nodes.name: ROLES.md
nodes.summary: Reference document for the platform's role-based access control (RBAC) system, defining the four-tier role hierarchy (Superadmin, Owner, Staff, Client), their respective permissions, and how roles are enforced at both the Supabase RLS database layer and the React frontend layer.
